LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum_Thought.stages.0.d: I feel like I can take on the world! This blue glow is amazing!
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory_Thought.stages.0.d: This premium cola makes me feel like a champion.
LanguageData.Nukashine_Thought.stages.0.description: Everything is wonderful! What was I doing again?
LanguageData.Nukashine_Thought.stages.0.label: nukashine bliss
